219 G1GB G1GB_SUPP_DRESS (G1GB) Dressing Support Provided CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: dressing - ADL support provided. "-" = Unknown, 0 = No setup or physical help from staff, 1 = Setup help only, 2 = One person physical assist,
